what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named recent-pitches/p-23.jpg in the design-source channel; it records identifiers, a blob reference, MIME type, authorship, creation time, and a one-line caption labeling it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter wraps asset metadata for an image/jpeg file
The image width and height are both 0
A blob:// URI is provided for the binary content
The source is listed as design_source_material
The body contains only a short SOURCE caption
standouts: Image dimensions are reported as 0 despite being an image record
The file is explicitly tagged as design ground-truth
It uses both an image:// address and a blob:// reference
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing image size extraction
No descriptive alt text or content summary for the image
No links to related pitches, sessions, or design artifacts
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source pitch image, flagged as ground truth but missing dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual or pitch content does recent-pitches/p-23.jpg contain?
Where is the blob b2:156bb62553bd40189113f32cdf406470 physically stored?
Should this record link to a pitch document or session?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a design ground-truth source record matches the metadata stub, but the actual content is minimal and the zero dimensions suggest incomplete extraction.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific pitch image in the design-source channel as an addressable, canonical reference for downstream design or review work.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable identity and provenance metadata for an image asset in the recent-pitches collection, including authorship and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for the JPEG image recent-pitches/p-23 in the design-source channel, including a blob reference, author session, creation timestamp, and a one-line ground-truth caption.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog and make addressable a design-source pitch image as ground-truth material.
